title: Ersatz MIL-STD-6016: Open-Source Link 16 / TADIL-J Message Schema
description: Reconstructed from publicly available documentation. NOT a substitute for MIL-STD-6016 or STANAG 5516.

governing_standards.MIL-STD-6016: Department of Defense Interface Standard - Tactical Data Link (TDL) 16 Message Standard (CONTROLLED)
governing_standards.STANAG_5602: Standard Interface for Multiple Platform Link Evaluation - SIMPLE (LIMITED)

frequency_band.source: SISO-STD-002-2021, Signal ID Wiki, AFIT Thesis

frequency_hopping.pattern: Pseudo-random, determined by net number and TSEC cryptovariable
frequency_hopping.source: SISO-STD-002-2021, Signal ID Wiki, AFIT Thesis

pulse_structure.single_pulse_description: 6.4 µs burst of CPSM at 5 Mbps

MSEC.description: Message Security - link layer encryption of message data

stacked_nets.description: Independent groups of JUs on different net numbers share same time slots

message_word.description: 75-bit message word (70 data + 5 parity) padded to 80 bits

packing_modes.name: Packed-4 Double Pulse (P4-DP)
packing_modes.description: Same word count as P4-SP but uses double-pulse encoding for improved jam resistance

simulation_network_header.description: SISO-STD-002 Link 16 Simulation Network Header (simulation-only construct)

messages.name: Initial Entry
messages.description: Net entry message transmitted by NTR/IEJU. Contains time slot assignments and network synchronization data. Transmitted in pairs, typically every 12 seconds in time slot A-0-6.
messages.notes: Field-level detail requires MIL-STD-6016. Used for initial and coarse synchronization.

messages.name: Test
messages.description: Network test message.

messages.name: Network Time Update
messages.description: Provides network time corrections and updates.

messages.name: Time Slot Assignment
messages.description: Assigns time slots to JUs on the network.

messages.name: Radio Relay Control
messages.description: Controls radio relay operations for beyond-line-of-sight messaging.

messages.name: Repromulgation Relay
messages.description: Controls repromulgation (retransmission) of messages via relay.

messages.name: Communication Control
messages.description: Communication control and network management directives.

messages.name: Time Slot Reallocation
messages.description: Dynamic reallocation of time slots during network operations.

messages.name: Connectivity Interrogation
messages.description: Interrogates network connectivity status.

messages.name: Connectivity Status
messages.description: Reports network connectivity status in response to interrogation.

messages.name: Route Establishment
messages.description: Establishes communication routes through the network.

messages.name: Acknowledgment
messages.description: Acknowledgment of received messages.

messages.name: Communication Status
messages.description: Reports communication system status.

messages.name: Net Control Initialization
messages.description: Initializes net control parameters.

messages.name: Needline Participation Group Assignment
messages.description: Assigns participation groups based on needline requirements.

messages.name: Indirect Interface Unit PPLI
messages.description: PPLI for units connected via indirect interface (e.g., forwarded via gateway).

messages.name: Air PPLI
messages.description: Precise Participant Location and Identification for air platforms. Contains voice callsign, geodetic position (lat/lon), altitude, course, IFF codes, air platform type, and network participation status. Transmitted nominally every 12 seconds.
messages.notes: This is the most commonly observed message type. The 3-word structure (Initial + Extension + Continuation) is confirmed by the SISO-STD-002 Annex B example. Exact bit offsets for payload fields require MIL-STD-6016.
messages.source: DSTO-TN-1257, SISO-STD-002-2021 Annex B, Viasat card, ADA404334

messages.name: Surface PPLI
messages.description: PPLI for surface (maritime) platforms. Contains position, course, speed, and identification data.

messages.name: Subsurface PPLI
messages.description: PPLI for subsurface (submarine) platforms.

messages.name: Land Point PPLI
messages.description: PPLI for fixed land-based platforms (e.g., command posts, radar sites).

messages.name: Land Track PPLI
messages.description: PPLI for mobile land-based platforms (e.g., ground vehicles).

messages.name: Reference Point
messages.description: Reports a reference point (e.g., datum, waypoint, or fixed geographic reference).

messages.name: Emergency Point
messages.description: Reports an emergency point (e.g., downed aircraft, distress signal).

messages.name: Air Track
messages.description: Reports an air surveillance track. Contains track number, position (lat/lon/altitude), speed, course, identity (pending/unknown/friend/neutral/suspect/hostile), platform type, specific type, nationality, strength, and track quality.
messages.notes: Most commonly used surveillance message. Similar fields to ADS-B. Exact bit positions require MIL-STD-6016.
messages.source: Wireshark dissector (Viasat card), ADA404334, ADS-B gateway doc, Falcon BMS

messages.name: Surface Track
messages.description: Reports a surface (maritime) surveillance track. Contains position, course, speed, identity, and vessel type.

messages.name: Subsurface Track
messages.description: Reports a subsurface (submarine) surveillance track.

messages.name: Land Point or Track
messages.description: Reports a land point or land mobile track.

messages.name: Space Track
messages.description: Reports a space surveillance track (satellite, missile, etc.).

messages.name: Electronic Warfare Product Information
messages.description: Reports electronic warfare product information associated with surveillance tracks.

messages.name: Acoustic Bearing and Range
messages.description: Reports acoustic bearing and range data for ASW operations.

messages.name: Amplification
messages.description: Provides amplifying intelligence information for tracks or events.

messages.name: Track Management
messages.description: Manages track data including track drops, updates, and transfers.

messages.name: Data Update Request
messages.description: Requests updated data for specified tracks.

messages.name: Correlation
messages.description: Correlates tracks from multiple sources to establish unified track picture.

messages.name: Pointer
messages.description: Points to related tracks or data.

messages.name: Track Identifier
messages.description: Provides track identification data.

messages.name: IFF/SIF Management
messages.description: Manages IFF/SIF transponder code assignments.

messages.name: Filter Management
messages.description: Manages data filtering criteria for track distribution.

messages.name: Association
messages.description: Associates related tracks or entities.

messages.name: Unit Designator
messages.description: Designates a unit for mission assignment or tasking.

messages.name: Mission Correlator Change
messages.description: Changes mission correlator assignments.

messages.name: Command
messages.description: Issues commands for weapons engagement and management.

messages.name: Engagement Status
messages.description: Reports engagement status between weapons platforms and targets.

messages.name: Handover
messages.description: Transfers engagement responsibility from one platform to another.

messages.name: Controlling Unit Report
messages.description: Reports from the controlling unit on engagement status.

messages.name: Pairing
messages.description: Pairs weapons platforms with targets for engagement.

messages.name: From the Weapon
messages.description: Status reports from a weapon in flight to the controlling platform.

messages.name: To the Weapon
messages.description: Commands and updates sent to a weapon in flight.

messages.name: Weapon Coordination
messages.description: Coordinates weapons employment between platforms.

messages.name: Mission Assignment
messages.description: Assigns missions (engagement, reconnaissance, etc.) to controlled units.

messages.name: Vector
messages.description: Provides steering vectors to controlled aircraft.

messages.name: Precision Aircraft Direction
messages.description: Provides precise aircraft direction for intercept.

messages.name: Flight Path
messages.description: Defines a flight path for controlled aircraft.

messages.name: Controlling Unit Change
messages.description: Transfers control of a unit from one controller to another.

messages.name: Target/Track Correlation
messages.description: Correlates targets and tracks for engagement.

messages.name: Target Sorting
messages.description: Sorts and prioritizes targets for engagement.

messages.name: Target Bearing
messages.description: Reports target bearing data.

messages.name: Airfield Status
messages.description: Reports airfield operational status.

messages.name: Air Platform and System Status
messages.description: Reports detailed platform and weapons system status for air platforms.

messages.name: Surface Platform and System Status
messages.description: Reports detailed platform and weapons system status for surface platforms.

messages.name: Subsurface Platform and System Status
messages.description: Reports platform and weapons system status for subsurface platforms.

messages.name: Land Platform and System Status
messages.description: Reports platform and weapons system status for land platforms.

messages.name: Parametric Information
messages.description: Reports electronic warfare parametric data (emitter characteristics, signal parameters).

messages.name: Electronic Warfare Control / Coordination
messages.description: Coordinates electronic warfare operations and countermeasures.

messages.name: Threat Warning
messages.description: Issues threat warnings for incoming threats.

messages.name: Imagery
messages.description: Transfers imagery data.

messages.name: Weather Over Target
messages.description: Reports weather conditions over a target area.

messages.name: U.S. National 1 (Army)
messages.description: U.S. Army national use message.

messages.name: U.S. National 2 (Navy)
messages.description: U.S. Navy national use message.

messages.name: U.S. National 3 (Air Force)
messages.description: U.S. Air Force national use message. Also used for free text messaging.

messages.name: U.S. National 4 (Marine Corps)
messages.description: U.S. Marine Corps national use message.

messages.name: French National 1
messages.description: French national use message 1.

messages.name: French National 2
messages.description: French national use message 2.

messages.name: U.S. National 5 (NSA)
messages.description: NSA national use message.

messages.name: UK National
messages.description: United Kingdom national use message.

messages.name: Over-the-Air Rekeying Management
messages.description: Manages over-the-air cryptographic rekeying operations.

messages.name: Over-the-Air Rekeying
messages.description: Performs the actual over-the-air rekeying of cryptographic variables.

messages.name: No Statement
messages.description: A 1-word message used to pad time slots to 3, 6, or 12 words. Contains no tactical information.

fields.name: Padding
fields.description: Set to all zeros or ignored
